headline: 4 Minutes. 1 Prompt. 1 Full Website.
image_keyword: AI website builder speed timer prompt

headline: One prompt. Complete brand system.
body: I tested 10x last week. Typed a one-line description of a SaaS product and got back a sitemap, wireframe, style guide, and 6 fully designed pages in under 4 minutes. Not a template. A custom layout with a coherent brand system.
image_keyword: AI generated website pages brand system

headline: Plan first. Design second.
body: 10x works differently from other AI website builders. It generates a structured plan first. Site map with 8-12 pages. Wireframe for each page. Color palette and type system. Only then does it produce the actual design. This planning step is what separates decent from production-ready.

headline: 7x faster than traditional agency workflows
body: Marketing teams using AI builders ship landing pages 7x faster than traditional agency workflows. A campaign that used to take 3 weeks now takes 2 days. The creative strategist focuses on messaging while AI handles layout execution.

headline: Exportable style guide included
body: The style guide output is the real unlock. 4 primary colors, 2 fonts, button variants, spacing tokens. Everything documented and exportable. Your AI-generated site doesn't just look good on day one. It stays consistent as you add pages.
image_keyword: design system style guide export tokens

headline: Validate ideas before writing code
body: Here's what this means practically. Founders can validate product ideas with real websites before writing code. Marketing teams can test 5 landing page variations in an afternoon. Agencies can deliver first drafts while the client's still on the discovery call.
image_keyword: founder validate idea landing page fast

headline: Follow me for 30 days of AI tools redefining speed.
